title: H-A2 normal/control independent-validation sample decision
purpose: Supersede the prior high-VIX-first validation sequence and pre-register normal/control validation samples before any additional Databento pull, exact replay, paper trading, or E2 claim.

user_decision_record.reason: The first independent-validation high-VIX sample was useful availability evidence but produced no candidate trade. The next sample must test whether H-A2's apparent edge is specific to normal/control regimes instead of collecting more stress-regime evidence.

supersedes_sequence.reason: High-VIX coverage is still a validation gap, but the immediate question is whether the locked H-A2 signal has independent behavior in normal/control regimes.

sample_policy.primary_question: Does the locked 09:35 H-A2 rule still produce candidate trades and implementable validation evidence in normal/control regimes?
sample_policy.selection_method: Use local VIX/VXV and macro labels only. Do not inspect or tune future option PnL before selecting the sample.
sample_policy.market_regime_note: This is a control sample, not acceptance evidence. It tests whether stress-only collection is misleading and whether a normal-regime exact replay path is worth funding.

candidate_estimate_batches.role: secondary normalizing-volatility control estimate after the first pack is understood

required_fields.reason: Reconstruct auditable 09:35 entry bid/ask and implementable entry price.
Keep implementable PnL, stop/target checks, and 15:45 forced-close handling comparable to existing H-A2 artifacts.
Reconstruct the 09:35 signal and verify underlying context for candidate days.
Use already-local VIX/VXV and macro labels; do not buy news or LLM inputs for this H-A2 decision.

future_execution_sequence.next_step: Build or update the H-A2 independent-validation cost-estimate runner so the first metadata-only estimate targets low_normal_vix_control_pack using DATABENTO_API_MO.
download_forbidden_until: The metadata-only estimate report exists for the selected batch.
Projected selected-key and MO/AI pool usage remain under cap.
A separate download decision artifact names the selected batch and confirms it still serves H-A2 normal/control validation without threshold changes.
do_not_do: Do not download broad 2025 calendar data.
Do not resume high-VIX-first acquisition before normal/control estimate decision.
Do not add an OOS-selected filter.
Do not run exact replay, paper trading, or E2 acceptance from this artifact.

allowed_claims: H-A2 normal/control independent-validation sample selection is pre-registered.
The prior high-VIX-first acquisition sequence is paused until normal/control evidence is planned.
The next allowed implementation step is a metadata-only cost estimate for low_normal_vix_control_pack, after validator and paid-cost audit pass.
The locked 09:35-only H-A2 signal and threshold 0.001 are preserved.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim H-A2 edge is validated.
Do not claim E2 acceptance-grade evidence.
Do not download paid data from this artifact.
Do not call live Databento metadata estimates from this artifact itself.
Do not request IBKR bars from this artifact.
Do not call LLMs from this artifact.
Do not retry GDELT from this artifact.
Do not add a new OOS-selected filter.
Do not treat sample-decision planning as validation evidence.
completion_criteria: The decision names exact normal/control sample dates before any additional provider call.
The selected sample dates have local VIX below 25 and no high-importance macro day in the local macro calendar.
The decision records the selected Databento key env name without storing key value.
The decision preserves the locked 09:35-only signal and threshold 0.001.
The decision forbids paid download, exact replay, paper trading, and E2 claims.
tier_blockers: No live metadata cost estimate yet
